about.headline: About me
about.text: Hey there, I'm Pepe and I hate chickens. Espacially the huge moron at the end of my game. I like to jump on chickens aswell and throw around random salsa bottles... I also like to sleep & running around in the desert.
about.connect: Let's connect if you also hate chickens!

tech.headline: Tech
tech.text: Emphasise that you have used a variety of front-end technologies in your projects. Where have you used these skills: static or dynamic websites, responsive layouts, data visualization interfaces, smooth user experiences?

dialog.headline: Don't see the skill you are looking for?
dialog.text: Feel free to contact me. I look forward to expanding on my previous knowledge. Also I have a special interest in learning:

intro.headline: Let's build something Cool together!
intro.introtext: Encourage people to contact you and describe what role you are interested in. Show that you will add value to their projects through your work.

work.headline: Projects
work.intro: Here you can find a selection of my previous projects.

project01.headline: El Pollo Loco
project01.description: El Polo Loco is a browser‑based jump‑and‑run game I built during my training at the Developer Akademie. The project showcases my skills in JavaScript, object‑oriented architecture, and implementing animations and game logic in the frontend. The goal was to create a lightweight, responsive game with clean and maintainable code.

project02.headline: Join
project02.description: Join is a collaborative task‑management application that I developed as part of a team during my training at the Developer Akademie. The project replicates core workflows of modern web applications, including a Kanban board, user management, and dynamic UI interactions. Our focus was on clean code architecture, agile teamwork, and building a scalable JavaScript‑based frontend.

project03.headline: DailyDash
project03.description: DailyDash is a personal dashboard project I’m building to organize my daily schedule, tasks, and athletic goals in one clean interface. It is designed to integrate multiple data sources such as calendar, weather, and fitness APIs into a modern, streamlined UI. The project is still in an early development phase, but initial screen designs and API concepts are already in place.

headline.text: What my colleagues say about me

ref1.name: Arno Nym
ref1.text: Hanna has proven to be a reliable group partner. His technical skills and proactive approach were crucial to the success of our project.

ref2.name: Max Mustermann
ref2.text: I had the good fortune of working with Hanna in a group project at the Developer Akademie that involved a lot of effort. He always stayed calm, cool, and focused, and made sure our team was set up for success. He's super knowledgeable, easy to work with, and I'd happily work with him again given the chance.

ref3.name: Lirum Larum
ref3.text: Our project benefited enormously from Simon's efficient way of working.
